Business: Talbros Automotive Components Limited engages in the manufacture and sale of auto components in India. The company offers gaskets with electrical control, multi-layer steel, post coated/selective area coated, exhaust and hot, rubber and edge molded, fiber, heat shield gaskets, and plastic moulded components.
